question: Leaves are turning yellow from the top, what should I do?
answer_en:
- Spread 3–4 kg well-rotted cow manure around each plant.
- Pour 1–2 liters jeevamrit at the roots every 10 days.
- Plant cowpeas or beans in between rows to fix nitrogen naturally.
answer_np:
[translate:माथिबाट पात पहेँला हुँदैछन्, के गर्नु?]
[translate:प्रत्येक बिरुवामा ३–४ केजी कुहिएको गाईको गोबर फैलाउनुहोस्।]
[translate:हरेक १० दिनमा १–२ लिटर जीवामृत जरामा हाल्नुहोस्।]
[translate:नाइट्रोजन बढाउन बालीबीच सिमी वा बोडी रोप्नुहोस्।]

question: How can I make my soil less acidic naturally?
answer_en:
- Spread 100–150 g clean wood ash per square meter.
- Mix 5–8 kg composted goat manure into top soil.
- Cover soil with thick plant leaves to reduce rain impact.
answer_np:
[translate:माटोको अमिलो कसरी प्राकृतिक तरिकाले कम गर्ने?]
[translate:प्रति वर्ग मिटर १००–१५० ग्राम सफा खरानी छर्कनुहोस्।]
[translate:माथिल्लो माटोमा ५–८ केजी कम्पोस्ट बाख्राको मल मिसाउनुहोस्।]
[translate:बर्षाको असर कम गर्न मोटो पातले माटो छोप्नुहोस्।]

question: Plant roots are weak and plants fall easily, what is missing?
answer_en:
- Add 50–70 g bone meal per plant near the roots.
- Lightly mix into soil and water well.
- Repeat once after 45 days.
answer_np:
[translate:बिरुवाको जरा कमजोर छ र सजिलै ढल्छ, के कम छ?]
[translate:प्रत्येक बिरुवाको जरानिर ५०–७० ग्राम हड्डीको धूलो हाल्नुहोस्।]
[translate:माटोमा हल्का मिसाएर राम्रो पानी हाल्नुहोस्।]
[translate:४५ दिनपछि फेरि एक पटक गर्नुहोस्।]

question: Leaf edges look burnt even in rainy season, why?
answer_en:
- This is potassium deficiency. Spread 150–200 g wood ash around each plant.
- Water lightly after applying ash.
- Give jeevamrit weekly for overall health.
answer_np:
[translate:बर्षातमै पातको किनार डढेजस्तो छ, किन?]
[translate:यो पोटासको कमी हो। प्रत्येक बिरुवामा १५०–२०० ग्राम खरानी छर्कनुहोस्।]
[translate:खरानी हालेपछि हल्का पानी हाल्नुहोस्।]
[translate:समग्र स्वास्थ्यका लागि हप्तामा जीवामृत दिनुहोस्।]

question: How to hold more water in my sandy field?
answer_en:
- Dig zaï pits 30 cm wide and 20 cm deep, 80 cm apart.
- Put 1 handful cow manure + plant leaves in each pit.
- Plant seeds directly in pits when rain starts.
answer_np:
[translate:बालुवे खेतमा पानी कसरी बढी थाम्ने?]
[translate:३० सेमी चौडा र २० सेमी गहिरो जाई खाल्डा ८० सेमी दूरीमा खन्नुहोस्।]
[translate:प्रत्येक खाल्डामा १ मुट्ठी गाईको गोबर र पात हाल्नुहोस्।]
[translate:बर्षा सुरु हुनासाथ खाल्डामै बीउ रोप्नुहोस्।]

question: How do I make vermicompost at home?
answer_en:
- Make a 1-meter shade pit, layer cow dung + dry leaves + kitchen waste.
- Add red earthworms after 15 days.
- Keep moist and harvest black compost after 60 days.
answer_np:
[translate:घरमै कम्पोस्ट कसरी बनाउने?]
[translate:१ मिटरको छायाँमा खाल्डो बनाएर गोबर + सुक्खा पात + भान्साको फोहोर तह-तह लगाउनुहोस्।]
[translate:१५ दिनपछि रातो कीरा हाल्नुहोस्।]
[translate:ओसिलो राखेर ६० दिनमा कालो कम्पोस्ट निकाल्नुहोस्।]

question: What crops should I grow together this rainy season?
answer_en:
- Plant maize + climbing beans + squash (Three Sisters).
- Maize gives support, beans fix nitrogen, squash covers soil with leaves.
- Harvest all three at different times.
answer_np:
[translate:यो बर्षातमा के-के सँगै रोप्ने?]
[translate:मकै + लहरै सिमी + फर्सी रोप्नुहोस् (तीन बहिनी)।]
[translate:मकैले टेको दिन्छ, सिमीले नाइट्रोजन जोड्छ, फर्सीले पातले माटो छोप्छ।]
[translate:तीनै फरक-फरक समयमा पाक्छन्।]

question: Soil dries very fast in summer, how to protect it?
answer_en:
- Cover entire soil with 10–15 cm thick dry plant leaves.
- Apply 2 liters jeevamrit per plant every 15 days.
- Water only in early morning or evening.
answer_np:
[translate:गर्मीमा माटो चाँडै सुक्छ, कसरी जोगाउने?]
[translate:सबै माटो १०–१५ सेमी बाक्लो सुक्खा पातले छोप्नुहोस्।]
[translate:हरेक १५ दिनमा २ लिटर जीवामृत प्रति बिरुवा हाल्नुहोस्।]
[translate:बिहान चाँडो वा बेलुका मात्र पानी हाल्नुहोस्।]

question: My soil is too sour and plants grow slowly, natural solution?
answer_en:
- Spread 100 g wood ash + 5 kg goat manure per square meter.
- Plant beans first to improve soil.
- Always cover soil with plant leaves.
answer_np:
[translate:माटो अमिलो छ र बिरुवा बिस्तारै बढ्छ, प्राकृतिक उपाय?]
[translate:प्रति वर्ग मिटर १०० ग्राम खरानी + ५ केजी बाख्राको मल हाल्नुहोस्।]
[translate:पहिला सिमी रोपेर माटो सुधार्नुहोस्।]
[translate:सधैं पातले माटो छोपिराख्नुहोस्।]

question: How to prepare jeevamrit at home?
answer_en:
- Mix 10 kg fresh cow dung + 10 L cow urine + 1 kg jaggery + 1 kg pulse flour + handful soil.
- Keep 7 days in shade, stir morning and evening.
- Dilute 1:10 with water before use.
answer_np:
[translate:घरमै जीवामृत कसरी बनाउने?]
[translate:१० केजी ताजा गोबर + १० लिटर गहुँत + १ केजी गुड + १ केजी गेडागुडीको पीठो + मुट्ठी माटो मिसाउनुहोस्।]
[translate:७ दिन छायाँमा राखेर बिहान-बेलुका चलाउनुहोस्।]
[translate:प्रयोग गर्नुअघि १:१० पानीमा पातलो बनाउनुहोस्।]

completion: This is a test line from my dataset.

question: My soil is acidic and leaves are yellowing, what can I do naturally?
answer_en:
- Spread 100-150 g wood ash per square meter to neutralize acidity.
- Apply 3-5 kg cow manure around plants for nitrogen.
- Cover soil with 5-10 cm plant leaves to retain moisture.
answer_np:
[translate:माटो अमिलो छ र पात पहेँलो हुँदैछ, प्राकृतिक उपाय के?]
- [translate:अमिलो कम गर्न प्रति वर्ग मिटर १००-१५० ग्राम खरानी छर्कनुहोस्।]
- [translate:नाइट्रोजन दिन ३-५ केजी गाईको गोबर बिरुवा वरिपरि हाल्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:ओस राख्न ५-१० सेमी पातले माटो छोप्नुहोस्।]

question: How to prepare natural liquid fertilizer during wet season?
answer_en:
- Mix 5 kg cow dung, 5 L cow urine, 500 g jaggery, 500 g flour in 200 L water for jeevamrit.
- Ferment for 5-7 days, stirring twice daily.
- Dilute 1:10 and apply 20 L per acre weekly.
answer_np:
[translate:बर्षातमा प्राकृतिक तरल मल कसरी बनाउने?]
- [translate:५ केजी गोबर, ५ लिटर गहुँत, ५०० ग्राम गुड, ५०० ग्राम पीठो २०० लिटर पानीमा मिसाउनुहोस् जीवामृतको लागि।]
- [translate:५-७ दिन किण्वन गर्नुहोस्, दिनमा दुई पटक चलाएर।]
- [translate:१:१० पातलो गरेर हप्तामा २० लिटर प्रति एकड हाल्नुहोस्।]

question: What intercropping method improves soil health?
answer_en:
- Use Three Sisters: plant corn, beans, squash together.
- Beans provide nitrogen, corn supports, squash shades soil.
- Rotate positions next season for balance.
answer_np:
[translate:कुन सँगै रोप्ने तरिकाले माटो स्वस्थ बनाउँछ?]
- [translate:तीन बहिनी प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्: मकै, सिमी, फर्सी सँगै रोप्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:सिमीले नाइट्रोजन दिन्छ, मकैले टेको, फर्सीले छाया।]
- [translate:अर्को सिजन स्थान साटासाट गर्नुहोस् सन्तुलनका लागि।]

question: Sandy soil drains too fast, how to improve it?
answer_en:
- Add 4-6 kg vermicompost per square meter to hold water.
- Plant legumes like cowpeas as green manure cover.
- Cover soil with 10 cm dry leaves for protection.
answer_np:
[translate:बालुवे माटो चाँडै सुक्छ, कसरी सुधार्ने?]
- [translate:पानी थाम्न प्रति वर्ग मिटर ४-६ केजी कम्पोस्ट हाल्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:सिमीजस्ता दलहन हरियो मलको रूपमा रोप्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:१० सेमी सुक्खा पातले माटो छोप्नुहोस् जोगाउन।]

question: Roots are weak in my plants, what nutrient to add?
answer_en:
- Mix 40-60 g bone meal into soil per plant for phosphorus.
- Apply during planting or top-dress.
- Water well after adding.
answer_np:
[translate:बिरुवाको जरा कमजोर छ, कुन पोषण दिने?]
- [translate:फस्फोरस दिन प्रति बिरुवा ४०-६० ग्राम हड्डीको धूलो माटोमा मिसाउनुहोस्।]
- [translate:रोप्दा वा माथिबाट हाल्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:हालेपछि राम्रो पानी दिनुहोस्।]

question: Why do leaf edges scorch in dry weather?
answer_en:
- Potassium shortage; spread 150-200 g wood ash per plant.
- Mix lightly into top soil.
- Repeat every 30 days if needed.
answer_np:
[translate:सुक्खामा पातको किनार डढ्छ किन?]
- [translate:पोटास कम; प्रति बिरुवा १५०-२०० ग्राम खरानी छर्कनुहोस्।]
- [translate:माथिल्लो माटोमा हल्का मिसाउनुहोस्।]
- [translate:आवश्यक भए ३० दिनमा फेरि गर्नुहोस्।]

question: How to prevent erosion on hilly land?
answer_en:
- Build terraces 1-2 m wide on slopes.
- Plant grass strips on terrace edges.
- Add goat manure 2-4 kg per terrace meter.
answer_np:
[translate:पहाडी जग्गामा कटान कसरी रोक्ने?]
- [translate:ढलानमा १-२ मिटर चौडा टेरेस बनाउनुहोस्।]
- [translate:टेरेस किनारमा घाँसको पट्टी रोप्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:प्रति मिटर टेरेसमा २-४ केजी बाख्राको मल हाल्नुहोस्।]

question: Dry field needs better water retention, what technique?
answer_en:
- Dig zaï pits 20-30 cm deep, 50 cm apart.
- Fill with 0.5-1 kg cow manure each.
- Plant in pits before dry ends.
answer_np:
[translate:सुक्खा खेतमा पानी थाम्ने तरिका के?]
- [translate:२०-३० सेमी गहिरो जाई खाल्डा ५० सेमी दूरीमा खन्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:प्रत्येकमा ०.५-१ केजी गाईको गोबर भर्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:सुक्खा सकिनुअघि खाल्डामा रोप्नुहोस्।]

question: Can I grow crops in very acidic soil?
answer_en:
- Yes, apply 200 g wood ash + 4 kg vermicompost per sq m.
- Choose acid-tolerant crops like potatoes.
- Monitor pH after 2 months.
answer_np:
[translate:धेरै अमिलो माटोमा बाली लगाउन मिल्छ?]
- [translate:मिल्छ, प्रति वर्ग मिटर २०० ग्राम खरानी + ४ केजी कम्पोस्ट हाल्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:आलुजस्ता अमिलो सहने बाली छान्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:२ महिनापछि pH जाँच्नुहोस्।]

question: How do worms benefit my garden soil?
answer_en:
- Start vermicompost bin with 2 kg cow dung + leaves.
- Add 500 worms after setup.
- Harvest 1 kg compost monthly for use.
answer_np:
[translate:कीराले बगैंचा माटोमा कसरी फाइदा दिन्छ?]
- [translate:२ केजी गोबर + पातबाट कम्पोस्ट बिन सुरु गर्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:सेटअपपछि ५०० कीरा हाल्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:महिनामा १ केजी कम्पोस्ट निकालेर प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।]

question: After harvest, how to maintain soil fertility?
answer_en:
- Practice minimal tillage, disturb only top 5 cm.
- Sow green manure like cowpeas immediately.
- Incorporate after 40 days growth.
answer_np:
[translate:कटाइपछि माटो उर्वर राख्ने कसरी?]
- [translate:कम जोताइ गर्नुहोस्, माथि ५ सेमी मात्र चलाउनुहोस्।]
- [translate:तुरुन्त सिमीजस्ता हरियो मल रोप्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:४० दिन बढेपछि माटोमा मिसाउनुहोस्।]

question: Plants stunted and pale in heat, what to apply?
answer_en:
- Spray 10 L diluted jeevamrit per acre every 2 weeks.
- Add 2-3 kg goat manure per plant.
- Cover soil with leaves to cool roots.
answer_np:
[translate:गर्मीमा बिरुवा सानो र फिक्का, के हाल्ने?]
- [translate:हरेक २ हप्ता १० लिटर पातलो जीवामृत प्रति एकड छर्कनुहोस्।]
- [translate:प्रति बिरुवा २-३ केजी बाख्राको मल हाल्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:जरा चिसो राख्न पातले माटो छोप्नुहोस्।]

question: Young leaves yellow, old ones fine, what's the issue?
answer_en:
- Nitrogen lacking; top-dress 2-4 kg cow manure.
- Apply 1 L jeevamrit weekly.
- Intercrop with legumes soon.
answer_np:
[translate:नयाँ पात पहेँलो, पुराना ठीक, समस्या के?]
- [translate:नाइट्रोजन कम; माथिबाट २-४ केजी गाईको गोबर हाल्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:हप्तामा १ लिटर जीवामृत दिनुहोस्।]
- [translate:चाँडै दलहन सँगै रोप्नुहोस्।]

question: Maximize yield in limited space with sustainable methods?
answer_en:
- Intercrop vegetables like tomatoes with beans.
- Rotate crops quarterly.
- Use Three Sisters for main plots.
answer_np:
[translate:सानो ठाउँमा बढी उत्पादन प्राकृतिक तरिकाले कसरी?]
- [translate:गोलभेँडाजस्ता तरकारी सिमीसँग सँगै रोप्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:हरेक तीन महिना बाली साट्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:मुख्य प्लटमा तीन बहिनी प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।]

question: Clay soil holds too much water, how to fix?
answer_en:
- Incorporate 3-5 kg vermicompost per sq m to aerate.
- Add 100 g bone meal for root strength.
- Build small terraces if sloped.
answer_np:
[translate:माटोले धेरै पानी थाम्छ, कसरी ठीक गर्ने?]
- [translate:हावा दिन प्रति वर्ग मिटर ३-५ केजी कम्पोस्ट मिसाउनुहोस्।]
- [translate:जरा बलियो बनाउन १०० ग्राम हड्डीको धूलो हाल्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:ढलान भए साना टेरेस बनाउनुहोस्।]

question: Improve depleted soil without chemicals?
answer_en:
- Grow cowpeas for 6 weeks as green manure.
- Chop and mix into soil.
- Add 1-2 kg goat manure afterward.
answer_np:
[translate:कमजोर माटो रसायन बिना सुधार्ने कसरी?]
- [translate:६ हप्ता सिमी हरियो मलको रूपमा बढाउनुहोस्।]
- [translate:काटेर माटोमा मिसाउनुहोस्।]
- [translate:पछि १-२ केजी बाख्राको मल हाल्नुहोस्।]

question: Potato leaves scorched in dry season, solution?
answer_en:
- Apply 200 g wood ash per row meter for potassium.
- Water deeply every 7 days.
- Cover soil with plant leaves 8 cm thick.
answer_np:
[translate:सुक्खामा आलुको पात डढ्यो, उपाय?]
- [translate:पोटास दिन प्रति रो मिटर २०० ग्राम खरानी हाल्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:हरेक ७ दिन गहिरो पानी दिनुहोस्।]
- [translate:८ सेमी बाक्लो पातले माटो छोप्नुहोस्।]

question: Slow growth in sour soil, indigenous fix?
answer_en:
- Spread 50-100 g wood ash per plant to adjust pH.
- Mix 2 kg cow manure for nutrients.
- Practice crop rotation starting now.
answer_np:
[translate:अमिलो माटोमा बढाइ ढिलो, स्थानीय उपाय?]
- [translate:pH मिलाउन प्रति बिरुवा ५०-१०० ग्राम खरानी छर्कनुहोस्।]
- [translate:पोषण दिन २ केजी गाईको गोबर मिसाउनुहोस्।]
- [translate:अबदेखि बाली साटासाट गर्नुहोस्।]

question: Retain moisture in sandy soil during hot days?
answer_en:
- Layer 15 cm plant leaves over soil.
- Add 5 kg vermicompost per sq m.
- Intercrop with cowpeas for shade.
answer_np:
[translate:गर्मी दिनमा बालुवे माटोमा ओस राख्ने?]
- [translate:१५ सेमी पात माटोमाथि तह लगाउनुहोस्।]
- [translate:५ केजी कम्पोस्ट प्रति वर्ग मिटर हाल्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:छाया दिन सिमी सँगै रोप्नुहोस्।]

question: Simplest home fertilizer for beginners?
answer_en:
- Collect 10 kg cow manure, pile with leaves.
- Turn weekly for 8 weeks.
- Use 1 kg per plant when ready.
answer_np:
[translate:नयाँलाई घरेलु मल सबैभन्दा सजिलो?]
- [translate:१० केजी गाईको गोबर पातसँग थुपार्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:हप्तामा पल्टाउनुहोस् ८ हप्ता।]
- [translate:तयार भएपछि १ केजी प्रति बिरुवा प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।]

question: Acidic sandy soil, plants wilting, what to add?
answer_en:
- Neutralize with 150 g wood ash per sq m.
- Boost with 3 kg goat manure.
- Cover soil with leaves to prevent drying.
answer_np:
[translate:अमिलो बालुवे माटो, बिरुवा ओइलाउँछ, के हाल्ने?]
- [translate:१५० ग्राम खरानी प्रति वर्ग मिटरले अमिलो कम गर्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:३ केजी बाख्राको मलले बल दिनुहोस्।]
- [translate:सुक्न नदिन पातले माटो छोप्नुहोस्।]

question: Best practice for wet season soil care?
answer_en:
- Minimal tillage to avoid compaction.
- Intercrop legumes for nitrogen.
- Use zaï pits in low areas.
answer_np:
[translate:बर्षातमा माटो हेरचाहको उत्तम तरिका?]
- [translate:जमिन नबिगार्न कम जोताइ गर्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:नाइट्रोजन दिन दलहन सँगै रोप्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:निच भागमा जाई खाल्डा प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।]

question: Weak stems in dry clay soil, help?
answer_en:
- Add 50 g bone meal per plant for phosphorus.
- Loosen with 4 kg vermicompost.
- Water sparingly every 5 days.
answer_np:
[translate:सुक्खा माटोमा डाँठ कमजोर, मद्दत?]
- [translate:५० ग्राम हड्डीको धूलो प्रति बिरुवा फस्फोरस दिनुहोस्।]
- [translate:४ केजी कम्पोस्टले खुकुलो बनाउनुहोस्।]
- [translate:हरेक ५ दिन थोरै पानी दिनुहोस्।]

question: Managing acidic soil in rain, tips?
answer_en:
- Apply 100 g wood ash mixed with water.
- Add 2 kg cow manure per row.
- Terrace if on slope to drain excess.
answer_np:
[translate:बर्षामा अमिलो माटो व्यवस्थापन टिप्स?]
- [translate:१०० ग्राम खरानी पानीमा मिसाएर हाल्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:२ केजी गाईको गोबर प्रति रो हाल्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:ढलान भए टेरेस बनाएर बढी पानी निकास गर्नुहोस्।]

question: Leaf burn in hot season, natural remedy?
answer_en:
- Spread 200 g wood ash for potassium boost.
- Dilute jeevamrit 1:15 and spray leaves.
- Shade with intercropped tall plants.
answer_np:
[translate:गर्मीमा पात जलेजस्तो, प्राकृतिक उपचार?]
- [translate:२०० ग्राम खरानी पोटास बढाउन छर्कनुहोस्।]
- [translate:जीवामृत १:१५ पातलो गरेर पातमा छर्कनुहोस्।]
- [translate:अग्ला बिरुवा सँगै रोपेर छाया दिनुहोस्।]

question: Sustainable way to enrich poor wet soil?
answer_en:
- Plant green manure legumes for 4 weeks.
- Incorporate with minimal tillage.
- Add 1 kg bone meal per sq m.
answer_np:
[translate:कमजोर ओसिलो माटो दिगो तरिकाले समृद्ध बनाउने?]
- [translate:४ हप्ता दलहन हरियो मल रोप्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:कम जोताइले मिसाउनुहोस्।]
- [translate:१ केजी हड्डीको धूलो प्रति वर्ग मिटर हाल्नुहोस्।]

question: Yellow leaves in acidic dry soil?
answer_en:
- Correct pH with 120 g wood ash per plant.
- Fertilize with 3 kg goat manure.
- Use zaï pits for better water use.
answer_np:
[translate:अमिलो सुक्खा माटोमा पहेँला पात?]
- [translate:pH ठीक गर्न १२० ग्राम खरानी प्रति बिरुवा।]
- [translate:३ केजी बाख्राको मलले मल दिनुहोस्।]
- [translate:पानी राम्रो प्रयोग गर्न जाई खाल्डा।]

question: How to do crop rotation effectively?
answer_en:
- Alternate legumes, roots, leaves yearly.
- Follow with green manure cover.
- Monitor soil after each cycle.
answer_np:
[translate:बाली साटासाट प्रभावकारी कसरी गर्ने?]
- [translate:दलहन, जरा, पात बाली वार्षिक साट्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:पछि हरियो मल छोप्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:हरेक चक्रपछि माटो जाँच्नुहोस्।]

question: Improve root growth in sandy dry soil?
answer_en:
- Add 60 g bone meal per hole at planting.
- Mix 4 kg vermicompost overall.
- Cover soil with 12 cm leaves.
answer_np:
[translate:बालुवे सुक्खा माटोमा जरा बढाइ सुधार्ने?]
- [translate:६० ग्राम हड्डीको धूलो रोप्ने खाल्डामा हाल्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:४ केजी कम्पोस्ट समग्र मिसाउनुहोस्।]
- [translate:१२ सेमी पातले माटो छोप्नुहोस्।]

question: Dealing with acidic clay in wet season?
answer_en:
- Spread 150 g wood ash to balance.
- Aerate with 5 kg cow manure.
- Build terraces for drainage.
answer_np:
[translate:बर्षातमा अमिलो माटो व्यवहार?]
- [translate:१५० ग्राम खरानी सन्तुलन गर्न छर्कनुहोस्।]
- [translate:५ केजी गाईको गोबरले हावा दिनुहोस्।]
- [translate:निकासका लागि टेरेस बनाउनुहोस्।]

question: Potassium deficiency in hot weather crops?
answer_en:
- Apply 180 g wood ash around stems.
- Supplement with 2 L jeevamrit biweekly.
- Intercrop with squash for cover.
answer_np:
[translate:गर्मी बालीमा पोटास कमी?]
- [translate:१८० ग्राम खरानी डाँठ वरिपरि हाल्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:२ लिटर जीवामृत दुई हप्तामा दिनुहोस्।]
- [translate:छोप्न फर्सी सँगै रोप्नुहोस्।]

question: Make jeevamrit for large farm?
answer_en:
- Scale to 20 kg dung, 20 L urine, 2 kg jaggery, 2 kg flour in 400 L.
- Ferment 7-10 days.
- Use 50 L diluted per acre.
answer_np:
[translate:ठूलो फार्मलाई जीवामृत बनाउने?]
- [translate:२० केजी गोबर, २० लिटर गहुँत, २ केजी गुड, २ केजी पीठो ४०० लिटरमा।]
- [translate:७-१० दिन किण्वन।]
- [translate:५० लिटर पातलो प्रति एकड प्रयोग।]

question: Yellowing in low pH dry conditions?
answer_en:
- Raise pH with 130 g wood ash per sq m.
- Add nitrogen via 4 kg goat manure.
- Minimal tillage to preserve structure.
answer_np:
[translate:कम pH सुक्खामा पहेँलो हुँदै?]
- [translate:१३० ग्राम खरानी प्रति वर्ग मिटर pH बढाउन।]
- [translate:४ केजी बाख्राको मलले नाइट्रोजन दिनुहोस्।]
- [translate:संरचना जोगाउन कम जोताइ।]

question: Three Sisters method details?
answer_en:
- Plant corn in mounds 1 m apart.
- Add beans around corn after sprout.
- Sow squash between mounds.
answer_np:
[translate:तीन बहिनी तरिका विवरण?]
- [translate:१ मिटर दूरीमा मकै डाँडामा रोप्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:अंकुराएपछि मकै वरिपरि सिमी हाल्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:डाँडाबीच फर्सी छर्नुहोस्।]

question: Vermicompost for dry season prep?
answer_en:
- Build bin with 15 kg dung layers.
- Introduce 1000 worms.
- Apply 3 kg finished per sq m.
answer_np:
[translate:सुक्खा सिजन तयारीमा कम्पोस्ट?]
- [translate:१५ केजी गोबर तहले बिन बनाउनुहोस्।]
- [translate:१००० कीरा हाल्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:३ केजी तयार प्रति वर्ग मिटर हाल्नुहोस्।]

question: Fix weak roots in acidic wet soil?
answer_en:
- Phosphorus boost: 70 g bone meal per plant.
- Neutralize with 110 g wood ash.
- Cover soil with leaves for stability.
answer_np:
[translate:अमिलो ओसिलो माटोमा कमजोर जरा ठीक?]
- [translate:७० ग्राम हड्डीको धूलो प्रति बिरुवा फस्फोरस दिन।]
- [translate:११० ग्राम खरानीले अमिलो कम।]
- [translate:स्थिरताका लागि पातले माटो छोप्नुहोस्।]

question: Terracing for wet sloping fields?
answer_en:
- Construct 50 cm high terraces.
- Plant vetiver grass on edges.
- Fertilize with 2 kg cow manure per m.
answer_np:
[translate:ओसिलो ढलान खेतमा टेरेसिङ?]
- [translate:५० सेमी अग्लो टेरेस बनाउनुहोस्।]
- [translate:किनारमा भेटिभर घाँस रोप्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:२ केजी गाईको गोबर प्रति मिटर मल दिनुहोस्।]

question: Green manure in dry areas?
answer_en:
- Grow cowpeas for 5 weeks.
- Cut and leave as cover.
- Add jeevamrit for decomposition.
answer_np:
[translate:सुक्खा क्षेत्रमा हरियो मल?]
- [translate:५ हप्ता सिमी बढाउनुहोस्।]
- [translate:काटेर छोप्न छोड्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:सडाउन जीवामृत हाल्नुहोस्।]

question: Scorched edges in low pH wet soil?
answer_en:
- Potassium fix: 160 g wood ash per plant.
- Adjust pH with extra ash.
- Minimal tillage to avoid washout.
answer_np:
[translate:कम pH ओसिलो माटोमा डढेका किनार?]
- [translate:१६० ग्राम खरानी प्रति बिरुवा पोटास ठीक गर्न।]
- [translate:थप खरानीले pH मिलाउनुहोस्।]
- [translate:बग्न नदिन कम जोताइ।]

question: Zaï pits for sandy dry land?
answer_en:
- Dig 25 cm deep pits 70 cm apart.
- Fill with 0.8 kg vermicompost.
- Plant millet or sorghum in them.
answer_np:
[translate:बालुवे सुक्खा जग्गामा जाई खाल्डा?]
- [translate:२५ सेमी गहिरो खाल्डा ७० सेमी दूरीमा।]
- [translate:०.८ केजी कम्पोस्ट भर्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:कोदो वा ज्वाँखे रोप्नुहोस्।]

question: Intercropping for nutrient balance?
answer_en:
- Mix beans with maize for nitrogen.
- Add squash for ground cover.
- Rotate with roots next.
answer_np:
[translate:पोषण सन्तुलनमा सँगै रोपाइ?]
- [translate:नाइट्रोजन दिन सिमी मकैसँग मिसाउनुहोस्।]
- [translate:जमिन छोप्न फर्सी थप्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:पछि जरावालीसँग साट्नुहोस्।]

question: Bone meal application in dry season?
answer_en:
- 45 g per plant for roots.
- Mix with goat manure 2 kg.
- Water after to activate.
answer_np:
[translate:सुक्खामा हड्डीको धूलो हाल्ने?]
- [translate:४५ ग्राम प्रति बिरुवा जराका लागि।]
- [translate:२ केजी बाख्राको मलसँग मिसाउनुहोस्।]
- [translate:सक्रिय गर्न पानी दिनुहोस्।]

question: Yellow leaves in acidic clay?
answer_en:
- 140 g wood ash to fix pH.
- 3 kg cow manure for nitrogen.
- Terrace for better aeration.
answer_np:
[translate:अमिलो माटोमा पहेँला पात?]
- [translate:१४० ग्राम खरानी pH ठीक गर्न।]
- [translate:३ केजी गाईको गोबर नाइट्रोजन दिन।]
- [translate:राम्रो हावा दिन टेरेस।]

question: Sustainable moisture in hot sandy soil?
answer_en:
- Cover with 10 cm leaves.
- Add 4 kg vermicompost.
- Use zaï pits strategically.
answer_np:
[translate:गर्मी बालुवे माटोमा दिगो ओस?]
- [translate:१० सेमी पात छोप्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:४ केजी कम्पोस्ट हाल्नुहोस्।]
- [translate:रणनीतिक जाई खाल्डा प्रयोग।]

question: Minimal tillage benefits in wet?
answer_en:
- Preserves structure, less erosion.
- Follow with green manure.
- Add jeevamrit for microbes.
answer_np:
[translate:ओसिलोमा कम जोताइ फाइदा?]
- [translate:संरचना जोगाउँछ, कम कटान।]
- [translate:हरियो मल पछ्याउनुहोस्।]
- [translate:माइक्रोब्सका लागि जीवामृत थप्नुहोस्।]
